_meta.craft_times_note: base_time is a compressed gameplay unit (NOT raw seconds). Components (12h)=300, weapons (12h)=360, weapons (1d)=480, warframe main (1d)=480, warframe main (3d)=720, resources (3d)=720. Quest warframes with 1-min build use base_time=30. All values clamped [30,900] by the foundry cog.
_meta.verification: wiki_verified=true means quantities were fetched live from warframe.fandom.com. wiki_verified=false means training-data fallback — verify and correct as needed.
_meta.entry_count: 230 entries: 45 warframes (×4 each = 180 component entries), 23 primaries, 14 secondaries, 13 melee, 1 sentinel, 3 craftable resources

rhino.name: Rhino
rhino._note: Main BP uses Gallium (not Orokin Cell) and builds in 1 day, not 3.

saryn_neuroptics.name: Saryn Neuroptics
saryn_neuroptics._note: Uses Circuits instead of Alloy Plate.

loki_neuroptics.name: Loki Neuroptics
loki_neuroptics._unverified_note: Wiki component pages use templates that did not render; training-data values matching early-frame pattern.

loki_chassis.name: Loki Chassis
loki_chassis._unverified_note: Wiki component pages use templates that did not render; training-data fallback.

loki_systems.name: Loki Systems
loki_systems._unverified_note: Wiki component pages use templates that did not render; training-data fallback.

valkyr_neuroptics.name: Valkyr Neuroptics
valkyr_neuroptics._note: Uses Circuits instead of Alloy Plate.

hydroid_neuroptics.name: Hydroid Neuroptics
hydroid_neuroptics._note: Uses Argon Crystal in place of Neural Sensors.

mirage.name: Mirage
mirage._note: Main BP uses Argon Crystal instead of Orokin Cell — wiki-confirmed. Components each require an Orokin Cell.

chroma_neuroptics.name: Chroma Neuroptics
chroma_neuroptics._note: Requires a built Ember Neuroptics component — Chroma uses other frames' parts.

chroma_chassis.name: Chroma Chassis
chroma_chassis._note: Requires a built Frost Chassis component.

chroma_systems.name: Chroma Systems
chroma_systems._note: Requires a built Saryn Systems component.

chroma.name: Chroma
chroma._note: Main BP uses Volt Neuroptics instead of Orokin Cell — unique mechanic requiring another Warframe's component.

limbo_neuroptics.name: Limbo Neuroptics
limbo_neuroptics._note: Quest warframe — components build in 1 minute (not 12 hours).

limbo.name: Limbo
limbo._note: Quest warframe (The Limbo Theorem) — main assembles in 1 minute. Requires 3 Orokin Cells.

ivara_chassis.name: Ivara Chassis
ivara_chassis._note: Requires Nitain Extract — rare Nightwave/Alert resource.

ivara_systems.name: Ivara Systems
ivara_systems._note: Requires Nitain Extract — rare Nightwave/Alert resource.

equinox_day_neuroptics.name: Equinox Day Neuroptics
equinox_day_neuroptics._unverified_note: Training-data values; Equinox component pages use complex templates.

equinox_day_form.name: Equinox Day Form
equinox_day_form._note: Intermediate assembly — must be built before main Equinox.

equinox_night_form.name: Equinox Night Form
equinox_night_form._note: Intermediate assembly — must be built before main Equinox.

equinox.name: Equinox
equinox._note: Unique 9-step build. Main BP requires Equinox Day Form + Equinox Night Form + Forma×1 instead of standard 3 components.

ignis.name: Ignis
ignis._note: Requires Detonite Injector (craft from Detonite Ampules) and Forma.

tonkor.name: Tonkor
tonkor._note: High credit cost (60,000) — Dojo research weapon.

buzlok.name: Buzlok
buzlok._note: Dojo weapon. Requires Detonite Injector×2 and Forma×1.

opticor.name: Opticor
opticor._note: Dojo weapon. Requires Fieldron×5 (craft from Fieldron Samples) and Forma×1.

afuris.name: Afuris
afuris._note: Requires 2 built Furis weapons — craft and claim Furis twice first.

akbronco.name: Akbronco
akbronco._note: Requires 2 built Bronco weapons — craft and claim Bronco twice first.

kunai.name: Kunai
kunai._note: Required to craft Tipedo. Previous entry had incorrect ingredients — now wiki-verified.

akmagnus.name: Akmagnus
akmagnus._note: Requires 2 built Magnus weapons — craft and claim Magnus twice first.

akvasto.name: Akvasto
akvasto._note: Requires 2 built Vasto weapons — craft and claim Vasto twice first.

tipedo.name: Tipedo
tipedo._note: Requires 1 built Bo and 1 built Kunai — craft and claim both first.

carrier.name: Carrier
carrier._note: Sentinel companion — not a weapon, but craftable in the Foundry.

detonite_injector.name: Detonite Injector
detonite_injector._note: Crafted from Invasion-reward Detonite Ampules. Required for Ignis×2 and Buzlok×2.

fieldron.name: Fieldron
fieldron._note: Crafted from Fieldron Samples (Invasion rewards from Corpus missions). Required for Opticor×5.

forma.name: Forma
forma._note: 23-hour build. Required by Ignis, Buzlok, Opticor, Akstiletto and more.

titania.name: Titania
titania._note: Quest: The Silver Grove. Blueprint from quest rewards.

nidus.name: Nidus
nidus._note: Quest: The Glast Gambit. Main BP requires Kuva×2000 instead of Orokin Cell.

octavia.name: Octavia
octavia._note: Quest: Octavia's Anthem. Main BP requires crafted Mandachord instead of Orokin Cell.

harrow.name: Harrow
harrow._note: Quest: Chains of Harrow. Main BP requires Kuva×2000.

khora.name: Khora
khora._note: Drops from Sanctuary Onslaught. All components need Kavat Genetic Codes.

revenant.name: Revenant
revenant._note: Plains of Eidolon/Quills faction frame. Needs Intact Sentient Cores from Eidolons.

garuda.name: Garuda
garuda._note: Orb Vallis / Fortuna frame. Main BP requires Kuva×3500. All parts use Toroid resources.

baruuk.name: Baruuk
baruuk._note: Orb Vallis / Vox Solaris frame. All components use Toroid and Orb Vallis resources.

hildryn.name: Hildryn
hildryn._note: Orb Vallis / Vox Solaris frame. All components require Lazulite Toroids.

gauss.name: Gauss
gauss._note: Drops from Disruption (Sedna - Kelpie). Chassis uses Fortuna gem resources.

wisp.name: Wisp
wisp._note: Drops from the Ropalolyst (Ganymede). All components need Hexenon (Jupiter resource).

grendel.name: Grendel
grendel._note: Parts locked behind Arbitrations Grendel missions (need Vitus Essence to unlock). Chassis/Systems need Plains of Eidolon hunt/fish resources.

protea.name: Protea
protea._note: Quest: The Deadlock Protocol. Parts from Granum Void. Chassis/Systems use Corpus Railjack resources.

xaku.name: Xaku
xaku._note: Community-designed frame. Components use mixed Deimos/Orb Vallis/Eidolon resources.

lavos.name: Lavos
lavos._note: Drops from Orphix Venom / Isolation Vault bounties (Deimos). Uses Deimos and Corpus resources.

yareli.name: Yareli
yareli._note: Ventkids Bash Lab Dojo research frame. All components from Dojo research.

sevagoth.name: Sevagoth
sevagoth._note: Quest: Call of the Tempestarii (Railjack). Blueprint from void storm missions.

gorgon.name: Gorgon
gorgon._note: Grineer heavy machine gun. Single-step build.
